evidence_summary: Establish the fragile and precarious nature of the China Country inhabitants through a meeting between a weary human traveler and a perfect porcelain figure. The visual language must emphasize the contrast between organic weariness and inorganic perfection,...
Dorothy meets a beautiful China Princess. The Princess explains the tragedy of being mended (loss of beauty) and the physical stiffness that occurs if they are removed from their homeland.
dorothy enters the dainty_china_country settlement looking weary.
dorothy listens in somber realization to the princess's limitations.
The meeting and subsequent exposition regarding porcelain fragility and mending.
